nasb.text: And He came down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee, and He was teaching them on the Sabbath;

esv.text: And he went down to Capernaum, a city of Galilee. And he was teaching them on the Sabbath,

cnv.text: 耶穌下到加利利的迦百農城，在安息日教導人。

ccb.text: 耶稣下到加利利的迦百农镇，在安息日教导众人。

csbs.text: 耶稣下到加利利的一个城迦百农去，在安息日教导人。
